lists.0: Storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
lists.1: Storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / O adjustment fail
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

lists.2: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Perfo
lists.3: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
lists.4: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
lists.6: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
lists.7: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

V_U_Floating_prim_CCP.comment: Consigne de tension de floating primaire

V_Pct_PerteSOC_Autorise_CCP.comment: Valeur de la perte de SOC autorisé

V_K_n_CCP.comment: Balance de prise en compte de la température ext ou moteur

V_U_batt_desat.comment: Consigne de tension batterie post désaturation alt

lists.0: Maximum number of start not reached

V_Temp_eq_cond_CCP.comment: Temperature d'equilibre estimé pendant la phase de parking

lists.1: Water pump activation requested by SSCU
lists.2: Water pump activation not requested by SSCU

V_K_Activation_driver_CCP.comment: Stop&Start function activation or deactivaton requested by the customer;

lists.2: rear defrost requested by the ECM

lists.1: front wiper low speed protection active

lists.2: Prompting for declutch display not requested

O_LIGHT_HBEAM_LH.comment: Regulation of left high beam light

V_B_BatteryDischargeByESM_OK_CCP.comment: Autorisation de décharge batterie en ESM

V_K_StopStart_state.comment: It corresponds to the state of the Stop&start function: inactive, active, unavailable nominal or not

lists.2: Stop Start Reminder display not requested

E_S_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres_cfg.comment: C_V_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres=80;    % [km/h] VehicleSpeed threshold to consider a rear gear fail

E_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCpt_cfg.comment: C_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCpt=2;       % [s] Time out to confirm rear gear failure [0;1;10]

lists.0: BCS protection not inhibited for manual start
lists.1: BCS protection inhibited for manual start

lists.0: BCS protection not inhibited for automatic start
lists.1: BCS protection inhibited for automatic start

E_B_ABSMalfunction_Inhibition_cfg.comment: Flag to indicate if ABSMalfunction inhibite Auto Stop

lists.0: Auto Start after stall not inhibited
No auto stop blocked reached protection

C_B_CorrosionInhibition.comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par  corrosion

C_B_CyclingInhibition.comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par cyclage

C_B_ESMInhibitionByBeam.comment: ESM inhibited by Lights (not used in this project)

lists.0: No activation of IHM Low battery voltage
lists.1: Activation of IHM Low battery voltage

C_B_SSVSStartMask.comment: Flag to mask the starter delay

lists.0: Ign OFF allowed if Vehicle speed >0
lists.1: Ign OFF not allowed if Vehicle speed >0

C_K_NBR_BRK_1.comment: C_K_NBR_BRK_1= 3;      %[-] Number of brakes before triggering pressostat in stop phase [0;1;63]

C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop.comment: C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop=450;       % [Rpm] Engine RPM for Display Alerte Stop Auto [0;1;700]

C_TM_DefautBouton.comment: C_TM_DefautBouton =20;      %[s] Button duration support to declar it in fault [0;1;60]

C_TM_HighSpeedWipingProtection.comment: timeout of high speed wiping protection

C_TM_SSVSActivationBeforeBoost.comment: = 0.005;     % [s] Time out between SSVS activation and Boost mode [0.005;0.005;0.020]
